name: wrangler
description: Cloudflare Workers CLI for deploying, developing, and managing Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, Workers AI, Containers, Queues, Workflows, Pipelines, and Secrets Store.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 wrangler 相關工作
幫我啟用 wrangler 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 wrangler

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the wrangler skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
